zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillaume des Baux-Orange於1212年出生在法國時，他的父親Raymond II des Baux - d'Orange24歲，母親Alasacie de Marseille20歲。他和Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於1266年1月30日在法國米迪-列內斯塔巴爾享年54歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillaume des Baux-Orange于1212年出生在法国时，他的父亲Raymond II des Baux - d'Orange24岁，母亲Alasacie de Marseille20岁。他和Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于1266年1月30日在法国米迪-列內斯塔巴爾享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: des
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Indian: variant of   Deo  . In Maharashtra, Konkanastha Brahmins have a clan called Dev.

variants.name: Deo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ravindra, Sohini, Vivek, Ajay, Alok, Anil, Annapurna, Daya, Ganga, Goutam, Harnek, Indra.

Indian (northern states): from Sanskrit deva ‘deity, lord’. This was a title used by ruling families in northern India. There is a Jat tribe called Deo. In northeastern India this name is spelled and pronounced Deb . Elsewhere, a common variant is Dev .
Italian: from a short form of the personal names Amadeo, Laudadeo, or Sperindeo, of which only the first now remains in use as a personal name.

nameMeanings.name: Guillaume
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Guillaume des Baux-Orange was born in 1212, in France, his father, Raymond II des Baux - d'Orange, was 24 and his mother, Alasacie de Marseille, was 20. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter with Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel. He died on 30 January 1266, in Barre, Tarn, Midi-Pyrénées, France, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillaume des Baux-Orange est né en 1212, à France, son père, Raymond II des Baux - d'Orange, avait 24 ans et sa mère, Alasacie de Marseille, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille avec Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel. Il est décédé le 30 janvier 1266, à Barre, Tarn, Midi-Pyrénées, France, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillaume des Baux-Orange 1212 in Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Raymond II des Baux - d'Orange 24 und seine Mutter Alasacie de Marseille 20. Er hatte mit Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 30. Januar 1266 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Barre, Tarn, Midi-Pyrénées, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume des Baux-Orange è nato il nel 1212 nel Francia, il suo padre, Raymond II des Baux - d'Orange, aveva 24 anni e il suo madre, Alasacie de Marseille, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia con Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel. Morì il 30 gennaio 1266, nel Barre, Tarn, Midi-Pyrénées, Francia, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillaume des Baux-Orangeが1212年にフランスで生まれた時，父Raymond II des Baux - d'Orangeは24歳，母Alasacie de Marseilleは20歳であった。彼はEugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournelとの間に少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘をもうけた。彼は1266年1月30日にフランスミディ-プイルeンeスターンバーアで54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillaume des Baux-Orange(이)가 1212년 프랑스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Raymond II des Baux - d'Orange(은)는 24세였고, 그의 어머니 Alasacie de Marseille(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel(와)과 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1266년 1월 30일 프랑스 미디-p이ee스 터아른 배르에서 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillaume des Baux-Orange nasceu em 1212, em França, seu pai, Raymond II des Baux - d'Orange, tinha 24 anos e sua mãe, Alasacie de Marseille, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha com Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel. Ele faleceu em 30 de janeiro de 1266, em Barre, Tarn, Midi-Pyrénées, França, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillaume des Baux-Orange родился в 1212 г. в местности Франция, его отцу по имени Raymond II des Baux - d'Orange было 24 года, а матери, которую звали Alasacie de Marseille, 20. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь от Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel. Он умер 30 января 1266 г. в местности барр, тарн, миди-пирeнeесь, Франция в возрасте 54 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillaume des Baux-Orange nació en 1212, en Francia, su papá, Raymond II des Baux - d'Orange, tenía 24 años y su mamá, Alasacie de Marseille, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija con Eugaris de Châteauneuf-Tournel. Murió el 30 de enero de 1266, en Barre, Tarn, Mediodía-Pirineos, Francia, a la edad de 54 años.
